title: Higher Education - Green & Spiegel
content:
Home > U.S Immigration-2 > U.S. Immigration > Business Immigration > Higher Education

## Comprehensive Legal Services For Higher Education
With offices in the United States and Canada, Green and Spiegel U.S. brings an international approach to practicing immigration law that is perfectly suited to addressing the needs of higher education providers, stakeholders, and employees. It is well known that colleges and universities are increasingly enrolling foreign students and hiring foreign national professors and Green and Spiegel U.S. is well equipped to handle this increased demand either through exclusive university relationships or as part of a list of service providers.
We have many years’ experience working with universities and colleges and have developed a range of legal services specifically tailored to meet your institutional needs. We appreciate that higher education is by nature internationally focused, and that many academic disciplines and programs are global, transcending political borders.
With our expertise, you can be confident in your ability to hire and retain the qualified staff and faculty from abroad that you need. Working with Green and Spiegel U.S. will ensure that your foreign national faculty and students can receive premium legal advice and support to obtain both nonimmigrant and immigrant visas. Furthermore, working with both large and small institutions, we scale our services to match your specific requirements, ensuring that our services are both efficient and cost-effective.
Universities and colleges make a vital contribution to the economic, cultural and intellectual life of the U.S., as well as promoting diversity and creativity. Supporting and encouraging this objective is an essential part of our mission, and one that we believe is fully supported by the U.S. immigration system. We look forward to working with you.
- Immigration Policy: For our firm, providing immigration counsel is more than just processing visas. Whatever the size of your immigration needs, we work with you to develop and maintain effective immigration policies and procedures for the entire hiring and retention process, especially in reference to existing collective bargaining agreements.
- Innovation: Green and Spiegel U.S. pioneered the development of InAGrad and the J-1 Incubator Program, which is poised to change entrepreneurial options for foreign entrepreneurs. We can similarly make this program a reality for your organization.
- Immigration Compliance: Compliance with hiring and immigration laws is now more important than ever, following recent trends of increasing government monitoring and investigations and major changes taking place in Washington. Green and Spiegel U.S. provides immigration risk management techniques to mitigate, if not eliminate, all areas of non-compliance.
- Responsiveness: We pride ourselves on responding to all emails and phone calls within 24 hours, if not immediately. In addition, we process our immigration filings with a commitment to efficiency, employing a pragmatic and thorough approach to all benefit submissions.
- Attorney Contact: You will always have the ability to speak with a licensed attorney who can advise you on all aspects of immigration law.
- No Charge Emails and Phone Calls: We offer scaled flat fees for universities and colleges, so you can plan your legal costs accordingly. As a client of Green and Spiegel U.S., you will never be charged for phone calls or emails. We feel that encouraging communication reduces the potential for error and saves money as well as resources.
- In-person Consultations: We gladly meet faculty members in our offices for in-person consultations, but we are also more than willing to visit universities and colleges to work directly with faculty, students, and human resources personnel / legal counsel. We know from experience that the value of meeting in person cannot be understated and we pride ourselves on building long-term professional relationships with our clients.
